strengths: Demonstrated good bilateral coordination during transfer sequences
Maintained stable grasping throughout most object manipulations
Successfully completed multiple transfer cycles before time expiration
weaknesses: Failed to complete the full task within the 300-second time limit
Showed inefficient movement patterns that consumed excessive time
Appeared to struggle with consistent pacing throughout the attempt

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the task phase slowly with minimal wasted regrasping and direct instrument paths between pegs.
drills.targets_weakness: Inefficient movement patterns that consumed excessive time.

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 15 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on smooth hand-to-hand exchanges.

drills.name: Timed completion segments
drills.description: Break the task into 6-transfer segments with 60-second targets to build consistent pacing awareness.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete within time limit.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid transfer mechanics into faster, more efficient sequences. Work on eliminating hesitation and developing a steady rhythm that can complete the full task within time constraints.
